title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
